conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone.
new_constraint: Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone. Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
response:
<|channel>thought
Art gallery.
Inquire about upcoming exhibitions.
Professional, polite, formal.
Avoid jargon.
Include the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once.

    *   Subject Line: Clear and professional.
    *   Salutation: Formal (Dear [Name/Gallery Team]).
    *   Opening: State the purpose of the email (interest in the gallery).
    *   Body: Ask about upcoming exhibitions, mention specific interest (optional but good for personalization), and include the required phrase.
    *   Closing: Call to action (requesting a schedule or newsletter) and professional sign-off.

    *   *Subject:* Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions at [Gallery Name]
    *   *Salutation:* Dear [Gallery Name] Team, (or Dear Curator,)
    *   *Opening:* I am writing to express my interest in the work showcased at your gallery. I have long admired your curation and the diverse range of artists you represent.
    *   *Body:* I am particularly interested in learning more about your upcoming schedule. Could you please provide information on any exhibitions planned for the next few months? I am drawn to the unique artistic vibes and funky aesthetics that your gallery often highlights.
    *   *Closing:* If you have a newsletter or a calendar of events, I would appreciate it if you could share those details with me. Thank you for your time and assistance.
    *   *Sign-off:* Sincerely, [My Name].

    *   *Professional audience?* Yes.
    *   *No jargon?* Yes (avoided terms like "provenance," "curatorial thesis," "ephemeral installations" unless necessary, but kept it simple).
    *   *Polite and formal?* Yes.
    *   *Phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" used exactly once?* Yes.

    Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions at [Gallery Name]

    Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

    I hope this email finds you well.

    I am writing to express my sincere interest in the exhibitions hosted at your gallery. I have followed your programming for some time and greatly appreciate the high quality of work you showcase.

    Could you please provide any information regarding your upcoming exhibition schedule for the remainder of the year? I am particularly interested in discovering new works that align with the artistic vibes and funky aesthetics that your gallery is known for.

    If you have a digital brochure, a calendar of events, or a newsletter I could subscribe to, I would be very grateful if you could share those details.

    Thank you for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you.

    Sincerely,

    [Your Name]
    [Your Phone Number - Optional]
    [Your Website/Social Media - Optional]<channel|>Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions at [Gallery Name]

I am writing to express my sincere interest in the exhibitions hosted at your gallery. I have followed your programming for some time and greatly appreciate the high quality of work and the diverse range of artists you represent.

Could you please provide any information regarding your upcoming exhibition schedule for the remainder of the year? I am particularly interested in discovering new works that align with the artistic vibes and funky aesthetics that your gallery is known for.
